tool_args.label: Grand Central Madison Zone 1 and Combo Ticket Pilots

payload.project_name: Grand Central Madison Zone 1 and Combo Ticket Pilots
payload.description: Establish Grand Central Madison as a LIRR/MNR Zone 1 station on a temporary pilot basis and launch a temporary one-way and round-trip Combo Ticket fare pilot for trips combining travel on both LIRR and MNR

evidence_refs.source_quote: To obtain Board approval for two actions related to the launch of Grand Central Madison (GCM) service: 1) establish Grand Central Madison as a LIRR/MNR Zone 1 station on a temporary pilot basis, and 2) launch a temporary fare pilot, the one-way and round-trip 'Combo Ticket'

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote is not present in the cited block

payload.description: Design, construction, financing and maintenance of ADA accessibility upgrades at thirteen stations throughout New York City using a P3 model, including 21 new elevators and 14 elevator replacements

payload.description: Investigation and remediation of property in the vicinity of the Town of Brookhaven Landfill (Yaphank Landfill) including acquisition of temporary and permanent easements on adjacent properties

evidence_refs.source_quote: LIRR entered into a Brownfield Cleanup Agreement with the New York State Department of Environmental Conservation (NYSDEC) for the purpose of investigating and remediating property in the vicinity of the Town of Brookhaven Landfill, also known as the Yaphank Landfill

payload.description: Construction of stations (including platforms, stairways, walkways, ADA compliance), electrical substations, and right-of-way augmentations along Amtrak's Hell Gate Line

evidence_refs.source_quote: construction of PSA, a number of permanent acquisitions will be required for stations (including platforms, stairways, walkways, and Americans with Disabilities Act compliance), electrical substations, and right-of-way ('ROW') augmentations along Amtrak's Hell Gate Line

tool_args.label: Grand Central Madison Zone 1 and Combo Ticket Pilots

payload.project_name: Grand Central Madison Zone 1 and Combo Ticket Pilots
payload.description: Establish Grand Central Madison as a LIRR/MNR Zone 1 station on a temporary pilot basis and launch a temporary one-way and round-trip Combo Ticket fare pilot for trips combining travel on both LIRR and MNR

evidence_refs.source_quote: To obtain Board approval for two actions related to the launch of Grand Central Madison (GCM) service: 1) establish Grand Central Madison as a LIRR/MNR Zone 1 station on a temporary pilot basis, and 2) launch a temporary fare pilot, the one-way and round-trip "Combo Ticket", for trips combining travel on both Long Island Rail Road (LIRR) and Metro-North Railroad (MNR).
